name: OpenMM Metadynamics
description: Perform enhanced sampling molecular dynamics with metadynamics biasing. Explore free energy landscapes using 1D or 2D collective variables. Calculate free energy surfaces for conformational changes and binding pathways. Support multiple CV types: RMSD, distance, angles, coordination, and gyration. Run well-tempered metadynamics for improved convergence. Conduct trajectory analysis including RMSD, RMSF, Rg, and bias evolution.
capabilities: Perform enhanced sampling molecular dynamics with metadynamics biasing
Explore free energy landscapes using 1D or 2D collective variables
Calculate free energy surfaces for conformational changes and binding pathways
Support multiple CV types: RMSD, distance, angles, coordination, and gyration
Run well-tempered metadynamics for improved convergence
Conduct trajectory analysis including RMSD, RMSF, Rg, and bias evolution

pdb_file.description: Protein structure in PDB format for metadynamics simulation

ligand_file.description: Ligand structure in SDF format for protein-ligand metadynamics

cv_type.description: Collective variable type for biasing the simulation

bias_height.description: Height of Gaussian bias in kJ/mol for well-tempered metadynamics

bias_pace.description: Frequency of Gaussian deposition in simulation steps
